results.title: CZR Exchange Announces Exclusive CZR VIP South of France Gala
results.description: Invitation-only luxury event expands the CZR VIP ecosystem with elite networking, premium hospitality, and curated experiences on the French Riviera Cannes, France , May 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CZR Exchange, a global digital asset trading platform, today announced the upcoming CZR VIP South of France Gala - an ultra-exclusive, invitation-only event designed to bring together leading investors, entrepreneurs, creators, and innovators from across the global digital asset industry. Set against the iconic backdrop of the French Riviera, the event represents a major expansion of the company’s CZR VIP initiative, which combines digital finance, luxury lifestyle experiences, and high-level global networking within a unified ecosystem. The CZR VIP South of France Gala will offer a premium multi-day experience featuring private hospitality, curated entertainment, luxury activations, and access to influential participants shaping the future of finance, technology, and Web3 innovation. "This event reflects the evolution of the CZR ecosystem beyond trading,” said Charlie Rothkopf, Founder and CEO of CZR Exchange. "The South of France Gala is about bringing together visionaries, builders, and global leaders in an environment that represents the future intersection of innovation, luxury, and digital finance.” The CZR VIP South of France Gala is being developed as a highly curated experience tailored for members of the CZR VIP ecosystem, strategic partners, institutional participants, and invited guests from around the world. Planned experiences and activations include: Exclusive access to luxury waterfront venuesHigh-level networking with global entrepreneurs and investorsPrivate VIP hospitality and concierge servicesCurated fine dining and premium entertainmentLuxury yacht experiences and after-party activationsExclusive community events and ecosystem engagement opportunities The event is expected to attract a select group of digital asset leaders, investors, creators, and high-net-worth participants from across international markets. The South of France Gala forms part of CZR Exchange’s broader strategy to expand the CZR VIP ecosystem into a premium global community centered around access, collaboration, and real-world engagement. Through CZR VIP, the company aims to deliver benefits that extend beyond digital asset trading by creating experiences that foster relationships, strategic partnerships, and long-term community development among forward-thinking individuals and organizations. The initiative also supports CZR Exchange’s broader international growth strategy and premium brand positioning within the global crypto industry. As CZR Exchange continues expanding across key markets, the company plans to introduce additional VIP activations, private experiences, and ecosystem-driven events in major international destinations. Further event details, strategic partnerships, and future CZR VIP experiences are expected to be announced in the coming months. About CZR Exchange CZR Exchange is a global digital asset trading platform headquartered in the Cayman Islands. Combining cutting-edge technology with a compliance-driven approach, CZR enables users to trade seamlessly across borders while ensuring instant settlement and institutional-grade security. results.title: US Lawmakers Condemn Trump Over ‘Racist’ Remarks on Indian Americans
results.description: A group of eight US lawmakers has introduced a resolution condemning US President Donald Trump over what they described as “racist rhetoric” targeting Indian and Chinese American communities. The resolution was led by Representatives Raja Krishnamoorthi , Ted Lieu and Pramila Jayapal , with five other lawmakers extending their support. The move comes amid growing criticism of remarks shared by Trump on social media. The lawmakers took strong objection to a post made by Trump on April 22 on his platform Truth Social, where he shared comments by radio host Michael Savage on birthright citizenship in the United States . In those remarks, immigrants from countries like India and China were accused of misusing the system. The resolution criticised such statements and stressed that immigrants from diverse backgrounds play a vital role in shaping the strength and future of the United States. According to the lawmakers, such rhetoric is harmful and does not reflect the values of inclusion and diversity that the country stands for. The controversy also drew a response from India’s Ministry of External Affairs, which termed the remarks as “uninformed, inappropriate and in poor taste,” without directly naming Trump or the radio host. The ministry further stated that such comments do not represent the true nature of India -US relations, which are built on mutual respect and shared interests. The resolution is seen as a political message against divisive language and a show of support for immigrant communities in the United States. More developments in the matter are expected as discussions continue. Also Read: US Weighs Partial Sanctions Relief for Iran Oil as Talks Continue; India Could Gain

results.title: India News | Nashik TCS Case: 1500-page Chargesheet Filed in Alleged Harassment, Religious Conversion Probe
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. In a major development in the Nashik TCS case, police have filed a 1500-page chargesheet in one of the first FIRs registered in connection with allegations of molestation, sexual harassment, and attempted religious conversion. The case has triggered nine FIRs and a Special Investigation Team (SIT) probe due to its seriousness.
